---

Screw-terminal breakout for the ESP32-S3 baseboard. Brings 12 GPIO pins, 3.3V and GND to labelled screw terminals. Includes 4 mounting holes for enclosure integration.

## Hardware Specifications

  - **Voltage**: 3.3V
  - **Pins**: 12 GPIO + 3.3V + GND
  - **Dimensions**: 72 x 40 x 14 mm
  - **Weight**: 22 g
